hero.subtitle: Second-year B.Tech ECE undergraduate bridging systems design with interactive media pipelines.

items.title: Photography & Visual Production
items.description: High-resolution commercial and editorial photography. From environmental portraits to product captures — delivering calibrated sensor data through Sony α6400 optics.

items.title: Frontend Engineering
items.description: Performance-first web interfaces built with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Hardware-accelerated animations, scroll-driven experiences, and responsive design systems.

items.title: VIDEO PRODUCTION
items.description: Designing and deploying robust videos curated to the viewer's taste.

items.title: COMMUNITY LEADERSHIP
items.description: Orchestrating technical fests, managing executive committees, and driving membership development initiatives.

items.title: Creative Direction & Branding
items.description: End-to-end visual identity systems — from typography selection and color science to motion language guidelines and cross-platform brand consistency.

cards.name: PORTFOLIO CORE v2.0
cards.description: Neo-Brutalist developer portfolio featuring GSAP scroll-bound animations and CRT shader effects.

cards.name: SUSTAINATION PLATFORM
cards.description: A sustainability-focused social platform designed to track and gamify eco-conscious habits.

items.title: B.Tech Electronics & Communication Engineering – College
items.detail: Pursuing undergraduate studies with a rigorous focus on hardware logic, embedded architecture, and full-stack software pipelines.

items.title: Membership Development Coordinator – IEEE
items.detail: Architected promotional systems and scaled onboarding metrics across international organizational vectors.

items.title: Media Operations – eNIX
items.detail: Orchestrated visual identity for ECE's biggest installations from Elevate to Adharva. Negotiated and secured two key corporate institutional sponsorships.

items.title: Rudhirasena Unit Coordinator – NSS
items.detail: Strategized and coordinated urgent multi-unit blood donation lifelines directly to the Regional Cancer Centre (RCC) and SCT. Documented 4-time active donor.

items.title: Creative Curator – FRAMES
items.detail: Entrusted with capturing the pulse of flagship corporate and artistic events, translating fleeting moments at Crossroads into permanent visual legacies.

items.title: Media Team – OpenLabs AI Club
items.detail: Managed media strategy, visual asset creation, and algorithmic design pipelines for emerging club ecosystems.

items.title: Execom Member – Film Club
items.detail: Directed asset generation, cinematic layouts, and promotional framework coordination for institutional film media deployments.

items.title: Emerging Professional – TRIBE IEDC
items.detail: Gained foundational structural alignment across layout design, field photography, and video post-production.

aboutProfile.story: Second-year B.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering student at Mar Baselios College of Engineering and Technology. I bridge hardware systems with high-performance interactive web pipelines.

photos.title: CONCRETE MONOLITH
photos.backstory: Captured during the dead of winter. The raw concrete angles provided a perfect study of harsh shadows intersecting at 90-degree vectors.

photos.title: SILICON ARTERIES
photos.backstory: A macro dissection of an exposed motherboard. I wanted to map the copper traces as if they were a city grid viewed from low-earth orbit.

photos.title: VECTOR SHADOWS
photos.backstory: Experimenting with intense single-source directional lighting to carve out the depth of the subject against an absolute black background.

benchmarks.title: Smart India Hackathon
benchmarks.description: Developed Sustaination, a gamified sustainable farming platform.
